name: Warm Blue Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 oz cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the bacon and cook in a skillet until almost crisp.
2. Drain excess fat from the skillet, then add minced garlic and continue cooking until the bacon is crisp.
3. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Using an electric mixer, beat the cream cheese until smooth and blend in the Half and Half.
5. Mix the cooked bacon mixture with blue cheese and chives.
6. Transfer into a 2-cup ovenproof baking dish, cover with foil, and bake for about 45 minutes.
7. Sprinkle chopped smoked almonds on top and serve with crackers, bread, or vegetables. Makes about 1-2/3 cups.
Jeff Viets
